meta.dc:title: Establishment of purchasing division; purchasing agent to head responsibilities

section.heading: Establishment of purchasing division; purchasing agent to head responsibilities

content.p: There is hereby created a purchasing section, the head of which shall be the purchasing agent, who shall be appointed by the city manager or designee. The purchasing agent's responsibilities shall include, but not be limited to, the following:
To develop and use contracts and purchase orders which will reduce to the minimum the accompanying paperwork and which in other respects will be most advantageous to the city.
